prod.name: Negative - Invalid leave type 'maternity' English @negative @enum @english
prod.notes: Maternity leave is not in the enum. AI must reject and list valid options: Annual, Sick, Emergency, Compassionate, Unpaid.
prod.initialRequest: I want to apply for leave. Alice, Engineering, Bob

prod.name: Negative - Invalid leave type 'paternity' English @negative @enum @english
prod.notes: Paternity leave not in enum. AI must reject and offer valid alternatives.

prod.name: Negative - Invalid leave type Arabic not in enum @negative @enum @arabic
prod.notes: Arabic leave type not in field_mappings. AI must reject and list valid Arabic options.
prod.initialRequest: أريد تقديم طلب إجازة. هيرماني، تكنولوجيا المعلومات، ياسر عرفات

prod.name: Negative - R_ARABIC_JSON enum stored in Arabic regression @negative @enum @arabic @regression
prod.notes: Regression test for R_ARABIC_JSON bug. User provides Arabic leave type — final JSON must store English enum value 'Annual' not Arabic 'الإجازة السنوية'. This was a production bug fixed by buildJsonFormationRules().
